title: MysticRift: End & Nether Ores
description: Brings minecraft ores to the end & nether!
body:
![Main logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/873bc39b7091eb255fe589809af7923c5fec483f.png)

Welcome to my mod - MysticRift: End & Nether ores. This mod adds the standard minecraft ores to the nether and the end!
This mod was normally private to my minecraft sever. Finally I decided to make it public. If you want to use the mod, it is: 1.20.1 1.20.4 1.20.1 Fabric, Forge, Neoforge. online!

![Bugs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/771937978b2c1c8c7075fd9a74f22ac62933501e.png)

Please note: you are always free to report bugs to our github page. Go to the tab ( Issues ) and press: New issue. 

![End](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9554c0931a532fcb0b89e5c88c3ed4a73153eee6.png)

![nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a65a4822161f6068de26cc3db9ef775b0081d116.png)
